# JAi Digital

Human Strategy × AI Speed.
Senior Digital Marketing Consultancy for UK SMEs.

## Technical Foundation
This site is built with a "Zero-Rot" systematic approach.
- Framework: Next.js 15 (App Router)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS 4.0-alpha (Zero-Deaf mandate)
- Motion: GSAP + ScrollTrigger
- Typography: Unbounded, Newsreader, Geist

## Design System
The production component library and brand guidelines are documented at [/design-system](/design-system).

## Principles
1. Diagnostics before prescriptions.
2. Structural integrity over agency hype.
3. Senior-practitioner depth.
